title: [V:25.7.1.3997] DB::Exception: Cannot read all data. Bytes read: 0.
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Hi,
I'm getting the following error and trying to understand why ?
query fail resulting in : `Code: 33. DB::Exception: Cannot read all data. Bytes read: 0. Bytes expected: 8. (CANNOT_READ_ALL_DATA) (version 25.7.1.3997 (official build))`
```sql
WITH
['7XGrdJRYtXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXsELwYpuuUu'] AS signers_list,
['XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX'] AS mints_list,
isolated_data AS (
SELECT
mint,
owner,
interval,
interval_start,
after,
decimals
FROM
stats.ledgers_buffer
WHERE
interval = '15m'
AND interval_start >= toStartOfInterval(now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR, INTERVAL 15 MINUTE)
),
aggregated_data AS (
SELECT
mint,
interval,
interval_start AS ts,
argMaxMerge(after) AS amount,
argMaxMerge(decimals) AS decimals
FROM
isolated_data
WHERE
owner IN signers_list
AND mint IN mints_list
GROUP BY
mint,
interval_start ,
interval
)
SELECT * from aggregated_data
```
queries working and returning data:
```sql
WITH
['7XGrdJRYtXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXsELwYpuuUu'] AS signers_list,
['XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX'] AS mints_list,
isolated_data AS (
SELECT
poc:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stats.ledgers
(
    interval String,
    interval_start DateTime,

    owner String,
    address String,
    mint String,

    amount AggregateFunction(sum, Int128),
    before AggregateFunction(argMin, UInt128, UInt64),
    after AggregateFunction(argMax, UInt128, UInt64),
    decimals AggregateFunction(argMax, UInt32, UInt64),
    price AggregateFunction(argMax, Nullable(Decimal(38,18)), UInt64),
    supply AggregateFunction(argMax, Nullable(UInt128), UInt64),
    interactions AggregateFunction(sum, UInt128),
    after_value AggregateFunction(argMax, Nullable(Decimal(38,18)), UInt64),
    amount_value AggregateFunction(argMax, Nullable(Decimal(38,18)), UInt64),
    INDEX idx_owner owner TYPE bloom_filter(0.001) GRANULARITY 64,
    INDEX idx_address address TYPE bloom_filter(0.001) GRANULARITY 64,
    INDEX idx_mint mint TYPE bloom_filter(0.001) GRANULARITY 64,
    INDEX idx_interval interval TYPE set(100) GRANULARITY 64
)
ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree
PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(interval_start)
ORDER BY (interval, toDate(interval_start) DESC, owner, address, mint, interval_start desc)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192, allow_experimental_reverse_key = 1;
key_bug_features: Cannot read all data during query execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stats.ledgers_test (interval String, interval_start DateTime, owner String, mint String, amount AggregateFunction(sum, Int128), after AggregateFunction(argMax, UInt128, UInt64), decimals AggregateFunction(argMax, UInt32, UInt64)) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY (interval, interval_start);
INSERT INTO stats.ledgers_test VALUES ('15m', now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR, 'owner2', 'mint2', 150, 250, 20);
SELECT mint, argMax(after, interval_start) AS latest_after FROM stats.ledgers_test WHERE interval = '15m' GROUP BY mint;
SELECT * FROM stats.ledgers_test WHERE amount > 0 AND interval_start >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
